name.zhCN: World Bank 发展数据实验室

summary.original: Browse World Bank topics, data sources, countries and indicators, then compare bounded multi-country development time series and read indicator or country resources without credentials.
summary.zhCN: 无需凭据即可浏览 World Bank 主题、数据源、国家与指标，对比有界的多国发展时间序列，并读取指标或国家资源。

description.original: The exact signed npm 0.1.14 package exposes seven read-only tools and two resource templates over the public World Bank API. Agent-OPT locks HTTPS GET access to https://api.worldbank.org/v2, removes endpoint overrides, proxies and credentials, caps catalogue pages and data queries, rejects all-country downloads, and works around a verified upstream defect by refusing keyword-only indicator search, which 0.1.14 silently treats as an unfiltered catalogue request. The dedicated Web lab requires a Topic or Source scope for keyword discovery and provides indicator definitions, multi-country charts, country profiles, catalogue browsers, resources, provenance and missing-value states.
description.zhCN: 精确锁定且带 npm 签名的 0.1.14 包通过公开 World Bank API 提供七个只读工具和两个资源模板。Agent-OPT 将 HTTPS GET 固定到 https://api.worldbank.org/v2，移除端点覆盖、代理与凭据，限制目录页和数据查询，拒绝全国家下载，并通过拒绝仅关键词检索来规避一个已验证的上游缺陷：0.1.14 会把该路径静默当成未过滤目录请求。专属 Web 实验室要求关键词同时绑定 Topic 或 Source，并提供指标定义、多国图表、国家画像、目录浏览、资源、来源和缺失值状态。

evidence.note: The official MCP Registry marks io.github.cyanheads/worldbank-mcp-server 0.1.14 active and latest, published 2026-06-20, and binds it to @cyanheads/worldbank-mcp-server 0.1.14. Agent-OPT uses only the local STDIO package.

npm records Apache-2.0, Node >=24, 58 files, 192,588 unpacked bytes, shasum f11ee9e90bd07d250bd01a8e6511e8dd2bca7e74, integrity sha512-fK16aTh61/IXcfgkGM+qrmz/NFP7bkl44cx35Zg8A189Nq9mPh8U/1deqQt/8WdhaH9AjPqNExqu97x9jXuXZg==, and a registry signature. It has no gitHead or package-level attestation, so no tarball-to-commit SLSA claim is made.

Annotated v0.1.14 dereferences to commit a89edf3905e744787579dd5e34749ba26df31473 and reports 134 upstream tests passing. The tag contains an SSH signature whose signer identity was not independently verified in this environment.

The pinned source and npm package declare Apache-2.0. World Bank API data and third-party indicator series retain their own source and data-use terms; Agent-OPT does not bundle or relicense the dataset.

Real exact-package STDIO calls ran all seven tools and both resources. The fixed sample returned eight 2020–2023 GDP-per-capita observations for USA and China, indicator metadata from World Development Indicators, China country metadata, 21 topics, and 71 data sources.

Qualification proved the 0.1.14 keyword-only implementation is misleading: World Bank ignores searchterm on this endpoint and returns the unfiltered catalogue, including unrelated poverty indicators. Topic+query and source+query paths perform client-side filtering and returned NY.GDP.PCAP.CD correctly, so Agent-OPT rejects keyword-only calls before launch.

license.evidence: The pinned v0.1.14 source and exact npm artifact declare Apache-2.0. Agent-OPT invokes the upstream package and adds an independent fixed-origin adapter, bootstrap, translation, tests and Web presentation without copying implementation code or bundling World Bank datasets.

description.original: List all 21 thematic topics and bounded pages of 70+ World Bank data sources for scoped indicator discovery.
description.zhCN: 列出全部 21 个主题和 70 多个 World Bank 数据源的有界分页，用于限定指标发现范围。

description.original: List countries by official region or income group and open one country or aggregate with codes, capital, coordinates, lending type, region and income classification.
description.zhCN: 按官方地区或收入组列出国家，并打开单个国家或聚合体的代码、首都、坐标、贷款类型、地区和收入分类。

name.original: Discover indicators within a Topic or Source
name.zhCN: 在 Topic 或 Source 内发现指标

description.original: Search indicator names, IDs and notes only within an explicit Topic or Source scope; misleading keyword-only catalogue requests are disabled.
description.zhCN: 只在明确 Topic 或 Source 范围内检索指标名称、ID 和说明；会产生误导的仅关键词目录请求被关闭。

name.original: Read indicator metadata and multi-country series
name.zhCN: 读取指标元数据与多国序列

description.original: Read source, definition, unit, organization and topics for an indicator, then fetch up to eight countries across at most 51 years or ten most-recent observations with missing-value status preserved.
description.zhCN: 读取指标的来源、定义、单位、组织和主题，再获取最多八个国家、最多 51 年或最近十期观测，并保留缺失值状态。

description.original: Read validated worldbank://country and worldbank://indicator resource URIs as structured reference context.
description.zhCN: 读取经过校验的 worldbank://country 与 worldbank://indicator 资源 URI，作为结构化参考上下文。

notes: The adapter launches only the exact local @cyanheads/worldbank-mcp-server 0.1.14 Node entry over STDIO with a 256 MiB old-space limit. Callers cannot select commands, packages, transports, environments, working directories or remote MCP hosts.

The bootstrap forces HTTPS GET access to https://api.worldbank.org/v2 on closed topic, source, country, indicator and country-indicator paths. It rejects alternate origins, ports, credentials, fragments, Request objects, bodies, redirects, arbitrary headers and query keys.

WORLDBANK_API_BASE_URL is deleted and re-pinned. Proxy, package, cloud, model-provider, auth, telemetry and credential variables are removed; sockets, arbitrary DNS, HTTP clients, datagrams, WebSockets, subprocesses, workers and server creation are denied outside the authorized fetch scope.

Topic/source filters, keywords, identifiers, country codes, region and income enums, pages, row counts, countries, year spans, most-recent counts, resource URIs, response bytes, JSON depth, arrays and text lengths are bounded before or after execution. Public data queries reject countries=all and accept at most eight unique codes.

The 0.1.14 keyword-only searchterm path is rejected because live qualification showed it returns an unfiltered catalogue. Topic+query and Source+query remain exposed with an explicit scope and bounded output.

Remote descriptions and values are untrusted, revision-prone public data. The dedicated Web renders escaped text only, preserves source names, observation status and nulls, and does not present a World Bank indicator as universally comparable without reading its definition.

requirements: The exact @cyanheads/worldbank-mcp-server 0.1.14 package installed from package-lock.json
Outbound TLS access to the fixed https://api.worldbank.org origin
No API key, credential, paid plan, external account, local data mirror, hardware device or remote MCP host is required

description.original: Origin, API paths, GET method, query keys, redirect mode, timeouts and response limits are adapter-controlled and cannot be selected by Web callers.
description.zhCN: 来源、API 路径、GET 方法、查询键、重定向模式、超时和响应限制由适配器控制，Web 调用方不能选择。

description.original: Keyword discovery requires a Topic or Source ID; data requests contain one indicator, up to eight validated country codes, and a bounded year range or most-recent count.
description.zhCN: 关键词发现必须提供 Topic 或 Source ID；数据请求包含一个指标、最多八个经过校验的国家代码，以及有界年份范围或最近期数。

notes: The integration offers broad, credential-free access to development statistics, country metadata, indicator definitions and reproducible historical comparisons through an official public API.

Registry identity, exact npm package, repository, annotated release tag, author, Node requirement, code license and protocol surface align. npm signs the artifact, but gitHead/SLSA provenance is absent and the SSH tag signer was not independently verified, reflected in the provenance score.

Qualification ran all seven tools and both resources. Fixed GDP-per-capita samples returned eight 2020–2023 observations for USA and China, while country, indicator, topic and source metadata were internally consistent.

Live qualification also found a material defect: keyword-only indicator search is not honored by the World Bank endpoint and returns unrelated rows. Agent-OPT disables only that misleading mode, tests the scoped alternatives, and records the limitation rather than claiming the full upstream surface.
World Bank indicators may be revised, carry source-specific licenses and methodologies, and contain null observations. The Web makes definition, source, observation status and null counts visible.

Kept World Bank, World Development Indicators, MCP, STDIO, Topic ID, Source ID, Indicator ID, ISO2/ISO3, aggregate and observation status as established organization, protocol and statistical catalogue terms.
Chinese copy distinguishes current-price, constant-price, PPP, percentage and count indicators, and directs users to read each indicator definition before comparison.

features: GPT-flavored scoped indicator discovery requiring Topic or Source, with effective-query, source, definition preview and indicator drill-down
indicator metadata profile for definition, source, organization, unit and topics
multi-country time-series workflow for up to eight countries and 51 years with SVG comparison chart, exact observation table and null count
regional country browser and country/aggregate profile with ISO codes, capital, coordinates, region, income group and lending type
21-topic and paged data-source catalogues that feed indicator discovery
worldbank://indicator and worldbank://country MCP resource readers
pending, activity, no-match, null observation, upstream error, keyword-only rejection, invalid identifier/range, source-boundary and responsive mobile states

tests.evidence: Vitest passed 3/3 integration tests. The exact 0.1.14 STDIO package exposed seven read-only tools, zero static resources, two resource templates and zero prompts; every tool and both templates were invoked through the fixed-origin adapter.

The real workflow listed 21 topics and 71 sources, found China in EAS and loaded its profile, found NY.GDP.PCAP.CD through Topic 3 plus keyword, loaded its WDI definition, returned eight 2020–2023 USA/China observations, and read both country and indicator resources.

A real missing country remained a controlled country_not_found error and a scoped no-match remained a non-error empty result with notice. The adapter rejected keyword-only search, conflicting scopes, all-country downloads, excess countries, excessive or conflicting year requests, malformed identifiers, invalid enums/pages/resources, extra baseUrl fields and oversized or malformed results.

The executable probe proved exact package pinning, fixed api.worldbank.org origin, redirect and Request-object denial, custom host/path/keyword-only/all-country and credential-header rejection, linked-root denial, host-read/write/subprocess/worker denial, forced base URL, and removal of proxies and credentials.

Vitest passed 2/2 public-route integration tests. The Next API exposed the exact seven tools and two resource templates, completed Topic- and Source-bound indicator discovery, indicator metadata, USA/China 2020–2023 observations, country and catalogue workflows, and both resource reads; it rejected keyword-only search, all-country downloads, conflicting scopes, malformed identifiers and invalid resource URIs.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=worldbank.spec.ts › @web-e2e [worldbank-development-data-lab] World Bank Web runs seven tools, two resources, guarded errors, and mobile layout; route=/plugins/worldbank-development-data-lab; result=passed
